title: middle-click-fix
description: Fixes issue where click to middle block button doesn't register for creative inventory actions
body: Fixes a long-standing Minecraft bug where using the 'click to middle block' button to pick a block in the creative inventory fails to register properly. This bug caused inconsistencies when players attempted to middle-click blocks, either to copy block types or interact with the inventory. The fix ensures that middle-click actions are consistently recognized, allowing players to accurately pick blocks and interact with the creative inventory as intended
